title: 0 pts
content:
0 pts
No Credit
Did not adhere to the instructions and guidelines provided in the prewriting exercise.
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Thesis Statement
5 pts
Full Credit
Generated a clear, concise, arguable, and focused statement that outlines the main argument or central purpose of the work.
3 pts
Partial Credit
Thesis statement somewhat communicates the main argument or central purpose of the work. It needs to refocus on the central theme.
0 pts
No Credit
Thesis is not clear, concise, arguable, or focused and weakly conveys the main argument or central purpose of the work.
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Supporting Points
10 pts
Full Credit
Offered three distinct, relevant, and well-articulated supporting points or arguments that substantiate and reinforce the main thesis or idea presented.
5 pts
Partial Credit
Offered 2 distinct, relevant, and well-articulated points or arguments the support and reinforce the main thesis presented.
